mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly supporting higher equity valuations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no statistical significance (p > 0.10) when FEDFUNDS remains below 0.5% over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month rise in the unemployment rate signals immediate labor market deterioration, triggering risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns within the next trading week.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE increases by > 0.5 percentage points month-over-month
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 5-day returns in more than 55% of instances where UNRATE rises above the 0.5pp threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail auto sales confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving corporate revenue growth and positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Rank correlation between the joint GDPC1-RSAFS signal and 60-day forward returns falls below 0.05 over any rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing capacity utilization, which translates to higher corporate profit margins and positive monthly equity returns during post-recession recovery phases.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to predict positive 20-day returns during recovery regimes, with out-of-sample accuracy below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of imminent monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and generating negative short-term market returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in over 60% of observations where CPIAUCSL MoM growth surpasses 0.4%.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent non-farm payroll growth reflects sustained labor market tightening, which supports wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows zero predictive power for 60-day forward returns, with a rolling Rank IC consistently below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in housing starts and declines in the unemployment rate signal a synchronized housing and labor market upturn, boosting consumer confidence and generating positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint HOUST-UNRATE signal fails to outperform a baseline market model, with 20-day return accuracy below 50% across 100 triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month contraction in industrial production signals an acute supply-side disruption or demand collapse, prompting immediate risk-off selling and negative weekly equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in more than 55% of instances where INDPRO falls below the 1.0% monthly decline threshold.
